subcodes.first_line: O Ali! The Divine Lote-Tree at the highest pole of the most exalted Paradise proclaimeth with this most glorious word: O concourse of the earth! By God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی سدره منتهی در قطب فردوس اعلی باینکلمه علیا ناطق یا ملا الارض تالله قد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
